hero.title: JETS INDEX
hero.subtitle: Your comprehensive encyclopedia for military aviation platforms
hero.description: A definitive resource for exploring aircraft, naval vessels, and military systems from around the world. Built for enthusiasts, researchers, and defense professionals.

comprehensiveData.title: Comprehensive Data
comprehensiveData.description: Detailed specifications, history, and operational details for hundreds of military platforms worldwide.

globalCoverage.title: Global Coverage
globalCoverage.description: From World War II classics to modern 5th-generation fighters, explore platforms from every era and nation.

openAccess.title: Open Access
openAccess.description: Free and open platform for anyone interested in military aviation and defense technology.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: Jets Index aims to be the definitive open-source resource for military platform information. We believe that knowledge about defense technology should be accessible to everyone - from aviation enthusiasts to defense analysts, students, and researchers.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.description: This project serves as a centralized database documenting military aircraft, naval vessels, and ground systems. Whether you're researching historical aircraft, comparing modern fighters, or learning about naval capabilities, Jets Index provides the data you need.

creator.title: The Creator
creator.description: Jets Index is a passion project built with modern web technologies. It combines a Next.js frontend with a NestJS backend, designed to be fast, responsive, and data-rich. The project is continuously evolving with new platforms, updated specifications, and improved user experience.

cta.title: Ready to Explore?
cta.description: Start browsing our comprehensive database of military platforms from around the world.

Blog.title: Latest News
Blog.description: Stay updated with the latest news and insights on military aviation platforms
